prompt:
You classify links from a website homepage into buckets. The buckets are:
- "Drop in": single-session classes, schedules, timetables, class prices, walk-in classes
- "Training": multi-day courses, teacher trainings (TTC, YTT, 200hr, 300hr), certifications, immersions, programs
- "Retreat": multi-day immersive stays away from the studio (abroad, in nature, residential retreats)
- "Contact": contact page, about-with-contact, location page
- "other": everything else

Return ONLY a JSON object with one key per bucket name. Each value is an array of
matched URLs (use the exact href from the input), except "other" which you may omit.
Cap each named bucket at 5 URLs. Prefer the most informative URL
when forced to choose. Use labels as the primary signal, URLs as fallback.
response:
```json
{
    "Drop in": [
        "https://www.shalastudios.com/schedule",
        "https://www.shalastudios.com/book-class",
        "https://www.shalastudios.com/events"
    ],
    "Training": [
        "https://www.shalastudios.com/academy",
        "https://www.shalastudios.com/apprenticeship",
        "https://www.shalastudios.com/academy-1"
    ],
    "Retreat": [],
    "Contact": [
        "https://www.shalastudios.com/contact",
        "https://www.shalastudios.com/datenschutz",
        "https://www.shalastudios.com/agb"
    ]
}
```

Here is a breakdown of the classification decisions.

- "Drop in" bucket contains:
  - schedule (informative)
  - book-class (informative)
  - events (more general, but includes walk-in classes)

- "Training" bucket contains:
  - academy (informative)
  - apprenticeship (informative)
  - academy-1 (less informative, might be about specific retreat rather than training, but no clear information about being a "retreat")

- "Retreat" bucket remains empty because the only link with the word 'retreats' is 'academy-1' which likely refers to a general training.

- "Contact" bucket contains:
  - contact (informative)
  - datenschutz (less informative, but relevant for legal aspects)
  - a.g.b (likely refers to terms and conditions, a subcategory in 'contact')
